case_title: TD BANK N.A. VS. ASN NATURAL STONE EAST, LLC et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF TD BANK N.A.
DECLARATION OF ANDREW K. ALPER RE INTEREST FIGURE ON SISTER STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TD BANK N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ASN NATURAL STONE INC. GARCIA, ROSE M. $434,628.47 PRINCIPAL, $29,721.12 INTEREST, $410.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $464,759.59, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, PARTIALLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT ASN NATURAL STONE INC. GARCIA, ROSE M.

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT ASN NATURAL STONE EAST, LLC ASN NATURAL STONE INC. SAJKOVIC, ALEXEY GARCIA, ROSE M. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

POS OF NTC OF ENTRY OD SISTER-STATE JUDGMNT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK N.A.
